descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes lead B.C. Junior Hockey League playoff series 4-0 against Kelowna Packers after 5-1 victory Saturday.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes took a commanding 4-0 series lead in the best-of-nine BCJHL playoff championship with a 5-1 win over Kelowna Packers in the Okanagan on Saturday. Coach Orland Kurtenbach said the team was performing well, and a Sockeyes victory Tuesday night at Richmond Arena would sweep the series. Richmond scored three unanswered goals in the third period, with Jason Philips scoring short-handed in the first and Dave Tomlinson making it 2-0 early in the second.
